rationale: Gov't Code §2303.407 governs enterprise-project job allocations and tax refunds based on capital investment. It has no relation to residence homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The bank shall allocate to an enterprise project the maximum number of new permanent jobs or retained jobs eligible based on the amount of capital investment made in the project
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns enterprise project tax refunds, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
